nasb.text: These are the sons of Seir the Horite, the inhabitants of the land: Lotan and Shobal and Zibeon and Anah,

esv.text: These are the sons of Seir the Horite, the inhabitants of the land: Lotan, Shobal, Zibeon, Anah,

cnv.text: 以下是那地原有的居民，何利人西珥的兒子：羅坍、朔巴、祭便、亞拿、

ccb.text: 以下是住在以东境内何利人西珥的子孙：罗坍、朔巴、祭便、亚拿、

csbs.text: 以下是当地的居民，何利人西珥的子孙： 罗坍、朔巴、基比文、亚拿、
